titleStmt.title: SII 11.78: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 78. (A.R. No. 459 of 1926). MUGAD, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE TANK BUND.

summary.p: The inscription refers itself to the reign of Traiḷōkyamalla Āhavamalladēva (i.e., Sōmēśvara I) and records the gift of some lands at Mugunda in Mugunda-Thirty made by the Nārgāvuṇḍa Chāvuṇḍa-Gāvuṇḍa to the Samyaktaratnākara-chaityālaya, constructed in the village by him, for repairs, etc., and for the feeding of visitors. It also records the construction of a nāṭakaśāle (theatre) attached to the temple by Mahāsāmanta Mārtaṇḍayya, grandson of Chāvuṇḍa-Gāvuṇḍa. Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chaṭṭayyadēva of the Kadaṁba family is said to have been governing Palasige Twelve Thousand and Koṅkaṇa Nine Hundred. Mugunda was, according to the record, situated in Mahārājavāḍi-nāḍu a subdivision of Palasige Twelve thousand. The inscription gives a long pedigree of the Jaina spiritual teachers of the Kumudi-gaṇa.

The inscription is dated in Śaka 966, Pārthiva, Chaitra, śuddha 5, Sunday. It may be remarked that the year Pārthiva corresponded to Śaka 967. The English equivalent of the date would be A.D. 1045, March 25, Monday; f.d.t. ·18. Sunday is evidently a mistake for Monday. A.D. 1007-8 was the only date for the chief Chaṭṭayya known so far. This record, therefore, extends his period by 37 years.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
bhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchchanaṁ jīyāttraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ [.] ©
ya samudrādhipavardhdhamāna jinaśāsana sampadrucirayāpanīya suradruma
kumudigaṇa . © bhadra mbhūyā jjinaśāsanāya . ©
© śrīkumudigaṇadi buṭṭi śrīkīrttigoravadi divyamuninātharvaiyākaraṇi tarkkasidhdhāntākara hṛtkamaḷa pa
vikhyātaṁ . va . Ā munīśvaraṁ saccaritatapōnuṣṭhāṇaniratanāda yaṁ . ka . neṭṭane
traya moḍavaṭṭire saccaritabharitaniyamōtkariṣa[ṁ .] puṭṭe vasundharege
bratipatigaḷ . tacchiṣyarkkusumāstrakujacchidurarbhbhavyasamyaktvasaṁvarddhanaṁ
cchada resada rprabhāśaśāṁkamunīndrar . Avara sahadharmmigaḷ . vri . vitatakhyā
niścaḷa rppinnayabratinātha rnnegaḻdēkavīramunipar śrīmanmahāvīra viśrutakīrtyavadā .
ndyācāryyavaryya rjjagannutacāritranarēndrakīrttimuninātha rkkīrttigēnnōntaro . Avara śiṣyar .
ddhāntādiṣaṭtarkkavaiyākaraṇapariṇatiśrī tammoḷoppiḻda kācaraṇa cāritra cakrēśvara
nāgabikki bratīndraṁ . va . Ā cāritracakravarttigaḷa sahadharmmigaḷ . vri . paramapuruṣavandyānindyapādāravindarssura
dhairyyardhuryyarācāryyavaryyar niratiśayatapōnuṣṭhānasandarbbhagarbhbhar nirupamaniravadyar viś®tānūnavidyar . va .
Ā niravadyakīrtti bhaṭṭārakara sahadharmmigaḷ . ka . Ī mahiyoḷe vasudēvasvāmigaḷaṁ jagatprasiddha
pārśvadēva svāmigaḷa vicitracarita mapagataduritaṁ . Avara sahadharmmigaḷ . vri . durita timiranāśarttatvaratna prakāśasa
ritamūrtta rtyaktaśērṣārttavṛttar paramakaruṇacitta rccārucāritrapūrttar nirupamaśubhacandra rmmādhavēndubratīndrar . va . Ā mādhavē
ndrara sahadharmmigaḷ . vri . bratipatibāḷacandramunipuṅgavarājitarāmacandraviśrutamuni pōttamarnnegaḻdarā munipōttama ragraśi
ṣya rapratihatavāgmayar jina�tōdayarundragirīndra bhāskararnnutamunicandradēva ravikīrttidayānidhidīpavarttigaḷ . va . mattamā ni
ravadyakīrttibhaṭṭārakakaḷpavṛkṣabījānkuraṁ puṭṭuvante puṭṭi . vri . vārddhivṛtākhiḷāvanitaḷakke nijābhimatānnamaṁ dayāpārddhi
vivarddhanaprada miveṁbina mikki caritrapātra gōvarddhanadēvanūrjjitaguṇaṁ harahāsavikāsakīrttigōvardhdhana bhōjanāṅga taru
śaṁkeyanuṁṭu māḍidaṁ . va . Ā munīśvaraneṁbabhōjanāṅgada samipadoḷ bhūṣaṇāṅgaṁ puṭṭuvante puṭṭe . vri . Anēkamaṇi mau
ktikāvayavagātravaicitra muniprakaradēvakōṭivṛtasatkathākīrṇnamaṁ ghanārṇnavasukarmmavi tavitānamaṁ māḍisa
ndaninditananantavīryyā kṛtakīrtisāmānyamē . ka . Avara sahadharmmigaḷu natabhuvanarssiddhāntatarkkavaiyākaraṇa pravi
cāralalana sarasijavī r śrīmatkumārakīrtti munīndrar . va . Āmunīśvarapriyaśiṣyar . vri . śamadamana
yamātmānantaśāntiprakāntaṁ . kumudakuvaḷayaśrīkāsisankāsikīrttipramadadaśadiśābhā bhāsuraṁ bhavya
padmadyumaṇinatanarēndraṁ dāmanandivratīndraṁ . va . Avarasahadharmmigaḷu catussamayasamucitācāra priya rana
vadyavidyāviśāradaprabuddharuṁ jagatprasiddharumappa traividyacūḍāmaṇigaḷ . vri . Anavadyācaraṇarkriyā
nukaraṇa rssiddhāntaśabdānuśāsanaṣaṭtarkkavicitranāṭakavacōḷaṁkārasāhityapāvanavidyāparipūrṇnaci
trakavitāvistīrṇnasandarbhbhagarbhbhaniruddhōnnatiyiṁ negarttevaḍeda rtraividyagōvarddhanar . va . Ā traividyagōvardhdhanadēvara śi
ṣya mukhyar . vri . śrīmadānatanarēṁdra tirīṭōddāmaratnanikarārccitapādarkkāmadurddhara gajēndra
dra rddāmanandimuni gaṇḍavimuktar . va . Antu kumudigaṇānvavāyakaumudīśaraścaṁ dra
mastavaḍḍācāryyaruṁ sakaḷariṣisamudāyamuṁ yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇaparamatapōnu
ṣṭhānaniratavṛttiyiṁ bhagavadarhatparamīśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka triḷōkāśraya śrīsamavaśaraṇānukāriyāgi varttisuttire ©
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabhamahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamallāhavamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamāna mācandrārkkatāraṁ
saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ śriḷōcanakadaṁba
kuḷakamaḷinīvikāsabāskara . nanēkasamaravijaya . śabdamahōdayōpārjjitavīraśrīnivāsadakṣiṇadōḻdaṇḍaṁ . page
muṭṭegaṇḍaṁ . pracaṇḍavairimaṇḍaḷikamadavēdaṇḍagaṇḍasthaḷakhaṇḍanapaṭiṣṭhaniṣṭhurabhujādaṇḍa(ṁ) . nanūnadānavārisantarppi
tasakaḷavibudhajanaśasyatrailōkyakaḷpadrumaṁ . mūrttinārāyaṇaṁ kīrttimārttaṇḍaṁ . maṇḍaḷikalalāṭapaṭṭam .
śrīma ccaṭṭayyadēvar palasigepannirccāsiramuṁ koṁkaṇamoṁbaynūṟumaṁ duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipāḷanayiṁ sukhasaṁkathā
vinōdadiṁ dāḷuttamire . ka . palasigepalasigepannircchāsiradoḷage mahārājavāḍināḍeṁbadu bhūlalanālapanamadarkkaṁ tiḷakame
nippudu mugunda mūvattenduṁ . bhāvise mugundamūvarttakkī vasudhege tiḷakamadaṟa nārggāvuṇḍaṁ cāvuṇḍaṁ nirjjitaśauryyā
vaṣṭaṁbhāvadhēyabāhāstaṁbhaṁ . va . svasti samastadustarārātimastakavidaḷanakiśōrakaṇṭhīrava . parasainyabhairavaṁ . tata
vitataghanaśuṣiravādyavidyāvācaspati . kāryyabṛhaspati . nijakuḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍaṁ . nuḍida rggaṇḍaṁ . śaraṇā
gatavajrapamjaraṁ . vairidikkuṁjaraṁ . sujanaprasaṅgaṁ . sāhasōttuṅgaṁ . nēkāṅgavīraṁ . vīrāvatāraṁ . kadanapracaṇḍaṁ pagemu
ṭṭegaṇḍaṁ . vinayavikhyātaṁ . nītimāndhātaṁ . nāmādisamasta praśastisamētarappa śrīma nnārggāvuṇḍaṁ cāvuṇḍagāvuṇḍaṁ mugundadoḷu
tannamāḍisida samyaktaratnākaracaityāḷayada khaṇḍasphuṭitanavakarmmakkaṁ nānādēsīya cāturvvarṇnabhōjanakkaṁ . mugundada
koḍageyyoḷage sakavariṣa 966 neya pārtthiva saṁvatsarada caitra śuddha paṁcami Ādivāradandu śrīmatpiri
yagōvarddhanadēvara kālaṁkarcci garddeyuṁ paḷagalumaṁ biṭṭaṁ . naḍu mugundada vāyavyada modala savaṇgeṟeyu madaṟa ba
ḍagaṇa garddeyu mavarkke sīme . savaṇgeṟe mūḍaṇa sīme . Aṇilāpurada pervvaṭṭe teṁkaṇa sīme . mēṇṭeya pervvaṭṭe paḍuva
ṇasīme . mattamā samaṇgeṟeyēṟiya baḍagaṇa kōḍiyi paḍuvalpāḷikaṭṭina mōgaḷeya baruhutōṁṭayāgi paḍuvaṇa
bhāgadoḷ mēṇṭeya baṭṭeyaṁ muṭṭebaḍagaṇa sīme © basadiya nairityada gōṁṭindaṁ sayu taṁkamogadebīdiyaṁ muṭṭu
dinamondondumanege padināṟu kayya lekkada mana mūṟu . Ā maneyiṁ mūḍalpadināṟu kayya dēhāra
da nela nādēhārada mūḍaṇa gōṁṭindaṁ teṁkalbīdivaraṁ nivēśaṇasīme © perggeṟeya modalēriya piriyatōṁṭadiṁ
teṁkamogada gāvuṇḍara paḍuvaṇa piriyatōṇṭada teṁkaṇa sīmeyiṁ sayu mūḍalkeṟi yēriya tōṇṭa
kke sīme . keygaṁ manegaṁ tōṇṭakka maruvaṇaṁ gadyāṇaṁ mūṟu . paṇa vāṟu paripuṁ pāraṇeyuṁ modalāgi kirukuḷa bā
dheyondu milladantāgi gāvuṇḍar pratipāḷisuvar . Intu samyaktaratnākarameṁba basadiyaṁ māḍisi bhūmiyaṁ biṭṭukṛta
krityanuṁ . samyaktaratnākaranuṁ . jinadharmmanirmmaḷanu(ṁ)māda nārggāvuṇḍa cāvuṇḍa gāvuṇḍanē doreyanendaḍe . v® .
manuviṁ sanmārggaśīḷaṁ surapatisutaniṁ śauryyasaṁpannanindrējyaninatyutpannamantra prakaṭanapaṭu (.) nāgāriyiṁ dīratātmaṁ dinakṛ
tsaṁjātaniṁ sūnṛtasakaḷavacōvārddhi (.) vidyādharādhīśaninudyaddhānadhārāniratanenipa cāvuṇḍarāyaṁ kṛtārttheṁ .
ka . Ātana tanayaṁbhujaparibhūtōgrārātisatyaravinandana nurvvītiḷakaṁ mānavamāndhātaṁ śrīnāgadēvana
suhṛddāvaṁ . Ānta virōdhige kupitakṛtāntaṁ kayyāntavibudhamāgadhajanatācintāmaṇi vīraśrīkāntanenalnegaḻda nā
gadēvaṁ dēvaṁ . vāgnārīmukhamukuraṁ dignāgavilagnaviśadakīrttiprasaraṁ magnārinikarana dharitabhṛgnāgaṁ nāgadēva
nadaṭara dēvaṁ . Ene negardda nāgadēvana tanayaṁ saṁgrāmavijaya saṁkrandana nandanahitatimiramārttaṇḍanudagrā
grapratāpadoḷ mārttaṇḍaṁ . mārttaṇḍaṁ raṇamukhadoḷ mārttaṇḍamaniṟidu gelvabhujavikramamāmārttaṇḍaṁ danujavrajamā
rttaṇḍamaniṟidugelva teṟanaṁ pōldaṁ . bhujadoḷ nindudu vīralakṣmi hṛdayāṁbhōjātadoḷ nindudaṁbujanābhapriyalakṣmi ne nindada
ttānanōdbhinnapaṁkajadoḷ sākṣatalakṣmidiktaṭadinī śāsirda diksāmaja brajadoḷ nindudu kīrttiyendoḍididēṁ mārttaṇḍa puṇyōdayaṁ .
Udayaṁ nityōdayaṁ bhāsuratanurucirōtkarṣarāgaṁ sarāgaṁ madavadvidviṣṭajaitraṁ danujavijayamāpūrṇṇa tējaṁ prabhāvāspa
demudyattīkṣṇatējaṁ . ripubahaḷatamōdhūtanirgghāta matyantadurantadhvāntavidhvaṁsaname nisida mārttaṇḍanugrājiśauṇḍaṁ . Amaḻdatta
tyugratējaprasara . maribaḷadhvāntapiṇḍaprakāṇḍaṁ tumuḻdattudvṛttagarvvōtkaṭa caṭuḷahatātkāra sankīrṇnacūrṇnaṁ Amaḻduttā
śagaṅgājaḷajaḷaruhanīhārakīrttipratānaṁ nimiḻdattāśānta maṁtā janamenipudu mārttaṇḍanugrapratāpaṁ . jagadoḷ
mārttaṇḍatējaprasarama niḷisuttirppa mārttaṇḍanūḷ saṁyuga kēḷīlōḷanoḷ bhāsuravitaraṇavidyābhisāra prayōgapraguṇasvāntātma
noḷ maccaripamaleva mārkoḷva māchāṁpa vidviṣṭagaṇaṁ pratyujvaḷaddīptige poḷeva pataṅgakriyāyukta nappaṁ .
rttanuttaṁ pagevinapesaroḷ rāvaṇaṁ barkke bennittaṟiyaṁ . mattenna danyapramadeya pesaroḷ raṁbe sāḻdirkke mēdā
nārtthiyeṁbī pesaro ḷakhiḷa bhūmaṇḍaḷaṁ bēḍu gillendaṟiyaṁ kīrtyaṅganādṛkśaphara sarasimārttaṇḍa nājipracaṇḍaṁ . vacanaṁ .
Ā mahānubhāvana śauryyaprabhāvamuṁ vitaraṇaprabhāvamu mupamātītamādudadaldadeyuṁ . baḷavatsā
mantacakra praghanaśarabhabhēruṁṇḍa sāmantakāntātiḷakādyāḷaṁkriyāpōhana karaṇakuśā(.) grīyaśauryyapratā
pānaḷa sāmantāntaraṅgaglapananipuṇa (.) sāmāntamārttaṇḍa ninnoḷ nelasirkkākaḷpakaḷpaṁbaramanu
pama dīrgghāyurārōgyabhāgyaṁ . svasti . samastadustarārātihastimastakasthaḷavidaḷa nōgrapancānanaṁ . śauryyaṣaḍānanaṁ . sa
kaḷakaḷākaḷitavāglalanālalāma(ṁ) . bhujabaḷabhīmaṁ . naribaḷajaḷadhibaḍavānaḷaṁ . drōhakāḷānaḷa ripuhṛdayase
llaṁ duṣṭāśvamallaṁ . bandhujanavanajamārttaṇḍaṁ . kāyvaragaṇḍaṁ . Arituragataṭṭasaṁghaṭṭaṁ . birudagāvaṇigaśarabhabhīruṇḍaṁ .
Aṣṭādaśapaṭṭaṇādhiṣṭhita paṁcapuṭṭigādi bāvannavīraṁ . śāsanapaṭṭasāliga samaya samuditalalāṭapaṭṭaṁ . vairi
gharaṭṭa . nanēkasaṁgrāma pārāvārapārāyaṇaṁ . caturapārāyaṇaṁ . samaravijayakāraṇaṁ . madāndharipumadani
vāraṇaṁ . paranārīdūra nēkāṅgavīra nasahāyaśauryya sāhasōttuṅga nayyanasiṅgaṁ gēṇekāṟaradēvanondiṟivātaṁ
lōkavikhyātaṁ samyaktaratnākaraṁ . padmāvatīlabdhavaraprasādaṁ nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāsāmantaṁ mārtta
ṇḍayyaṁ tamma muttayyaṁ māḍisida basadiyaṁ paḍisalisi nāṭakaśāleyaṁ māḍisi tannakīrttiśiḷāstaṁbhamanācandrā
rkkatāraṁbaraṁ nilisida . © bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhissagarādibhiḥyasyayasya yadā bhū
mistasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . Ī dharmmama nāvanorvvaṁ pratipāḷisidanātana vaṁśamuttarōttarā
bhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamirkkuṁ .
Digital edition of SII 11.78 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
